name: Pepperrotsmor (Horse Radish Butter)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter using an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
2. Drain the horseradish and squeeze out any excess liquid.
3. Beat the drained horseradish and salt into the creamed butter until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and chill until ready to use.
5. Serve cold, accompanied by hot grilled or fried fish.
